# David van Vliet

## About
David van Vliet is a founder based in Palo Alto, California. He graduated from Rice University in Houston, Texas in 2025 with a BA in Computer Science and a Minor in Statistics, completing his degree one year early.

## Current Work
David is the founder of Radar Corporation, based in San Francisco, California. The Radar Corporation builds information platforms that facilitate optimal capital flow in both public and private markets.

## Past Experience
- Software Engineering at Main Capital Partners (The Hague, The Netherlands) — Summer 2023 and Summer 2024
